# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented rb-lite as a compact Bash-first CLI in bin/rb-lite with run-loop orchestration, git-state stability fingerprinting including staged/unstaged/untracked content, .rb-lite/.ralph-burning exclusions, configurable implementer/reviewer commands, concurrent reviewer execution, aggregated latest-review.md, remediation rounds for P0/P1/P2/P3 findings, clear help text, README, Makefile, .gitignore, and deterministic smoke tests using fake commands.","steps":[{"order":1,"status":"completed","description":"Inspected repository instructions and existing rb-lite files under /home/user/rb-lite."},{"order":2,"status":"completed","description":"Verified the Bash CLI supports the requested run command, flags, environment variables, prompt construction, artifact layout, reviewer aggregation, and remediation behavior."},{"order":3,"status":"completed","description":"Verified smoke tests cover implementer stabilization, remediation after P1 review output, clean review success
